name: media-viewer
description: Desktop media viewer for YEAR/EVENT structured photo & video libraries

scripts.build:helpers: cd src-tauri/helpers && xcrun swiftc -O -o vision-tagger vision-tagger.swift && xcrun swiftc -O -o reverse-geocoder reverse-geocoder.swift
scripts.install-app: npm run build:helpers && tauri build --bundles app && rm -rf '/Applications/Media Viewer.app' && cp -R src-tauri/target/release/bundle/macos/'Media Viewer.app' /Applications/ && codesign --force --deep -s - '/Applications/Media Viewer.app'
